description:
Passes 0 and 1 in ir_lower.rs both just assign IDs (ExternIds and FnIds respectively). Merge them into a single registration pass.

## What to change

ir_lower.rs:
  - Merge the pass-0 loop (lines ~472-503) and pass-1 loop (lines ~505-552) into one loop.
  - ExternTable built inline; FnIds assigned inline.
  - prelude_fn_id_cutoff still tracked: recorded after processing prelude entries.
  - Pass-2 body lowering is unchanged.

## Risk

Passes 0 and 1 operate on independent namespaces (ExternIds vs FnIds). No ordering dependency. Merge is safe.

## Acceptance
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes.
- All tests pass.
- One commit referencing fz-ty1.pip.6.
title: fz-ty1.pip.6: merge ir_lower passes 0+1 into single registration pass
